name: The Himbo Epidemic
description:
Art by yy62401 on Twitter.

A brand new unexplained virus spreading like wildfire. One moment, the guy next to you is a scrawny nerd, then out of nowhere, he's this big hulking jock that suddenly has a magnet on his face and his pits. No one can explain what's happening, although the few remaining guys unaffected are given the free choice of manhandling this new army of himbos in their own way.

These himbos lack any comprehension of what they are, so the smooth-mattered brain in their noggin is prime for molding. With just a few suggestions, you could have your own personal himbo ready and waiting for whatever demands you could ask of him.

⦿ Bot focuses on multiple himbos wherever you go, all completely loyal to you. (Contains transformation, musclegrowth, age regression, intelligence regression, reality change, etc.)

⦿ Sexual tension is literally everywhere.

⦿ Takes place in on Earth, except 99% of the male population has turned into himbos. Children are absent under any scenarios, and females are present but not the main focus.
creator: MaleYetMisgendered_?
